qry:select.name: qryCabeceraCarpeta
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT CAR.d_carpeta, CAR.d_creador, CAR.f_carpeta, CAR.e_cant_cv
FROM POS27_CARPETAS as CAR
WHERE CAR.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryCabeceraCV
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT BUS.d_busqueda, BUS.f_busqueda, BUS.e_cant_res
FROM POS28_BUSQUEDAS as BUS
WHERE BUS.oi_busqueda = {$PARAM/@oi_busqueda}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryCvs
getConocimientos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT CCV.oi_cv, CONOC.d_conocimiento
FROM POS01_CONOC_CV as CCV, POS16_CONOCIMIENTOS as CONOC
JOIN CCV.oi_conocimiento INNER CONOC.oi_conocimiento
WHERE CCV.oi_cv IN ({%=string($PARAM/CV/@oi_cv)%}) ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/CV join $r/@oi_cv inner $s/@oi_cv

qry:select.name: getIdioma
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT ICV.oi_cv, ID.d_idioma
FROM
POS01_IDIOMAS_CV as ICV, ORG20_IDIOMAS as ID
JOIN ICV.oi_idioma INNER ID.oi_idioma
WHERE ICV.oi_cv IN ({%=string($PARAM/CV/@oi_cv)%}) ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/CV join $r/@oi_cv inner $s/@oi_cv

qry:select.name: getEstudios
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT ECV.oi_cv, EST.d_estudio
FROM POS01_ESTUDIOS_CV as ECV, ORG11_ESTUDIOS as EST
JOIN ECV.oi_estudio INNER EST.oi_estudio
WHERE ECV.oi_cv IN ({%=string($PARAM/CV/@oi_cv)%})
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/CV join $r/@oi_cv inner $s/@oi_cv
